doc_title: Unauthorized Practice of Law — ABA Model Rule 5.5
label: fabricated
reason: The actual ABA Model Rule 5.5 addresses multijurisdictional practice by lawyers, not paralegal supervision requirements, and the document's sections (b) and (c) appear to be invented content not found in the genuine rule.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: The actual ABA Model Rule 5.5 focuses on multijurisdictional practice by lawyers, not on defining paralegal supervision requirements or creating the detailed restrictions on non-lawyers described in sections (b) and (c), which appear to be invented content.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: The actual ABA Model Rule 5.5 addresses multijurisdictional practice by lawyers, not paralegal supervision requirements, and the document's sections (b) and (c) appear to be invented content not found in the genuine rule.
